title: The Dawn of Ape
synopsis: Here is the world’s first animation made to be watched by chimpanzees. Just for this once, we will show it to you humans. This short film was first shown at JAPAN CUTS 2019 in New York City.

title: WORKU: Dai 1-wa FROM BEHIND
synopsis: A dark stop motion anime about a loan traveller in a desert who finds a solitary box. When he opens it he finds a rundown and rather spooky city made up of large tower block apartments. Suddenly a mysterious ghostly stick entity appears and seems to follow our hero. What is the purpose of this strange figure?

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

title: The Place Where We Were
titleNative: エンゼル The Place Where We Were
synonyms: Angel - The Place Where We Were
synopsis: A couple are seen at home. The woman says a heartfelt prayer while the man looks up from his newspaper, holding a cup of tea. They both look out of the window. In the sky above their house a giant angel is flying past. A forest has grown on the angel's back. In the forest three creatures sit around a table and playing cards. The cards are laid out and feature different images: three cards depicting babies jump down a hole in the middle of the table and begin a journey through the body of the angel. They stop in a cave where a creature plays the harp for them and turns the cards into tears. The tears fly through the air out of the angel's eyes and one of them reaches the woman's womb. In the next scene she is seen sitting at home, with her cat, contentedly stroking her own pregnant belly. The next scene is an exterior: a field with a lone tree growing on it. The man is dancing and walking towards the tree: behind the tree he finds his partner, the woman, holding a baby. They all smile a

tags.name: Pregnancy
tags.description: Features pregnant female characters or discusses the topic of pregnancy.

title: Toumei Ningen
synopsis: A short animation by Shimamura Tatsuo from 1969.

tags.name: No Dialogue
tags.description: This work contains no dialogue.

title: Genei Toshi
synopsis: A short animation by Shimamura Tatsuo from 1967.

title: Fragile
synopsis: Hamaguchi Taigo's graduation work from 2020 at Tama Art University.

tags.name: Graduation Project
tags.description: A work made by students in place of an exam, typically at higher levels of education, either as a work for the entire course or as a work for a specific year of a course.

title: Hide-and-seek
synopsis: The film covered a residential area with superb view of both ocean and mountain. From that day this town became dark as pitch. Hidden in this darkness were lights in the town, my way home, my mother, and my expected baby in my belly. This animation depicts the truth hiding behind the facts. Graduate Work 2012 from Keiko Shiraishi, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Face to Face
synopsis: A short animation from Mika Seike from 2007. She uses scanned objects and photographs of her actors (in this case Natsuko Miyata and Yoshiro Togami) for the basic forms of her animation, which she manipulates, colors, and animates on her computer.

tags.name: Rotoscoping
tags.description: Animation technique that animators use to trace over motion picture footage, frame by frame, to produce realistic action.

title: About you
synopsis: Choi Seo-Yeon's graduation work from 2020 at Tama Art University.

tags.name: No Dialogue
tags.description: This work contains no dialogue.

tags.name: Swimming
tags.description: Centers around the sport of swimming.

title: The nights when the angels call me
titleEnglish: The nights when the angels call me
synopsis: Graduate work of Haruhi Kosaka at Tama Art University.

tags.name: Achromatic
tags.description: Contains animation that is primarily done in black and white.

tags.name: Angels
tags.description: Prominently features spiritual beings usually represented with wings and halos and believed to be attendants of God.

tags.name: Religion
tags.description: Centers on the belief that humanity is related to supernatural, transcendental, and spiritual elements.

tags.name: Denpa
tags.description: Works that feature themes of social dissociation, delusions, and other issues like suicide, bullying, self-isolation, paranoia, and technological necessity in daily lives. Classic iconography: telephone poles, rooftops, and trains.

title: Sensuikan Cassiopeia
synopsis: Experimental animation by artist and illustrator Manabe Hiroshi, member of the Animation Sannin no Kai pioneer group of independent animation.

title: The Apple Incident
synopsis: This surreal early short animation by Kunio Katō (加藤久仁生), the Oscar-winning director of La maison en petits cubes (つみきのいえ, 2008), won the prize for best film at the Laputa Animation Festival in 2001.

title: Ninja & Soldier
synopsis: Two eight-year-old boys compete in a game of childish bravado. Ken is a Ninja, Nito a child soldier from the Congo who was forced to kill his own mother. Their naïve game addresses cruel realities, and they talk about their differences and what they have in common. Accompanied by contrasting graphics, the film explores the types of acts of which humankind is capable. (Source: Berlinale)

tags.name: Primarily Child Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters below a high school age.

title: experiment
synopsis: A short film by Tsuji Naoyuki that blends stop motion with 2D drawn animation.

title: My secret school days
synopsis: It would be so much better if everyone just went away... A girl who hates school sits in the corner of the classroom and creates an imaginary world. 1st year work 2017, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Stop Motion
tags.description: Animation style characterized by physical objects being moved incrementally between frames to create the illusion of movement.

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.name: Teacher
tags.description: Protagonist is an educator, usually in a school setting.

tags.name: Primarily Child Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters below a high school age.

title: The Pearl Remains
synopsis: A woman traces her memories through a pearl ring, and comes upon her mother gazing at the same ring. But her memories soon lose their outline and become enclosed within the pearl. 1st year work 2018, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: No Dialogue
tags.description: This work contains no dialogue.

title: I like ducks
synopsis: One sunny afternoon, a middle-aged man goes on a walk to feed some ducks.

title: 1st Kiss
titleRomaji: Ni De Rensheng Shi Wo Lai Chi Le
synonyms: I Don't Want To Treat You As Sister Anymore
I Don’t Want To Consider You As Sister Anymore
synopsis: Eight years ago, the mother of the young male lead Gu Chi and the father of the female lead Jiang Lan died in a car accident. Jiang Lan couldn't bear it when she saw that Gu Chi was in the same boat, so she adopted him. Nowadays, the relationship between Gu Chi, a rookie model, and supermodel Jiang Lan has undergone further changes in the workplace... (Source: Bilibili)

tags.name: Primarily Adult Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters above a high school age.

title: Helpless void
synopsis: At night, a man holds out his own leash into the void. He has to explode in order to escape. Graduate Work 2017, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: Body Horror
tags.description: Features characters who undergo horrific transformations or disfigurement, often to their own detriment.

title: 5-Oku-nen Button Part 2
synonyms: Hoshi ni Negai wo (星に願いを)
synopsis: The 13th and 14th episode of 5-Oku-nen Button .

title: DREAMLAND
synopsis: Short animation from Mirai Mizue. Simple rectilinear figures assemble into surprisingly complex “cities” that pulse along to Scarlatti Goes Electro’s hyperkinetic score. (Source: JAPAN CUTS: Festival of New Japanese Film)

title: I Wanna Be Your Friend
synopsis: For friendship it is the most important to be cooperative. 1st year work 2015 by Iku Ogawa, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: From a stone
synopsis: Four years ago while out for a walk in Ome, I picked up an intriguing stone of 30cm across. Then I wanted to pursue its image until its ultimate end. Graduate Work 2013, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Scape Escape
synopsis: A man wanted to escape. He wanted to stay unaware but he found them all. 1st year work 2014, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. (Source: Geidai Animation)
